sections.paragraph:
ποιμαίνω [ποιμήν] the history of this term indicates a close association of tending and ruling: ‘serve as tender of a flock’, tend, shepherd

—a. of tending a flock of sheep Lk 17:7; w. focus on ensuring pasturage 1 Cor 9:7.

—b. in transf. sense

—α. of tending God’s people, w. focus on care Mt 2:6; J 21:16; Ac 20:28; 1 Pt 5:2; Rv 7:17.

—β. of tending to one’s own interests Jd 12.

—γ. w. focus on governing aspect Rv 2:27; 12:5; 19:15.
